_doc: Pass-C canonical taxonomy: 57 raw mechanism labels -> 18 canonical features, merged by mechanism (technique x effect). Applied non-destructively by tools/apply_canonical_labels.py (raw mechanism.label preserved; canonical_label added). See docs/pass_c_taxonomy.md. 2026-06-24: i2s_relational_collision_gate folded into i2s_string_literal_substitution (it was the floating-offset variant, confirmed by gate_signature==false; mechanistically identical literal substitution). 2026-06-25: i2s_operand_value_precision_at_equal_reach_gate (n=6, all string operands 'Host:'/'://'/'pop3'/'GPOS') folded into i2s_string_literal_substitution -- its arbiter rule measured vpc-vs-naive value distance (I2S lands the literal, blind mutation does not), i.e. exact-literal substitution confirmed via the value-distance route instead of operand_enrichment (same as case 1's floating-offset sub-case); not a distinct mechanism. 2026-06-25: i2s_structural_assembly_reach_depth (n=8: bloaty/87,90, harfbuzz/6236, lcms/2113, libpng/3820,3965, libxml2/6909,7287) folded into i2s_string_literal_substitution -- the 'multi-magic structural assembly' story was not separately verifiable by ANY cheap metric (depth_lift is loop-confounded + near-tautological; byte-offset enrichment skips 5/8 floating-field gates; in-function magic-gate count does not separate cat-3 from cat-1 because the interlocking checks live in CALLEE functions; static call-graph depth breaks on name-format/missing-entry and overlaps cat-1). Mechanistically it is the same I2S operand substitution as cat 1 -- paste the literal(s) -- only with several operands scattered across a multi-stage container; 'structural assembly' is a DESCRIPTION, not a distinct mechanism. I2S-pro now has TWO canonical categories (string_literal, numeric_tag). 2026-06-25: vp_operand_byte_enrichment (n=5: lcms/2143, harfbuzz/6048, sqlite3/15515, libpng/3999, libpng/4145) folded into vp_gradient_value_distance_closure -- same VP mechanism (Hamming gradient climbs to the exact gate operand), only the MEASUREMENT route differs: operand_enrichment when the operand has a fixed offset, value_distance_reached when it floats (exactly the dual route i2s_string_literal_substitution uses). Not a distinct mechanism; these LWWL/L_WL branches sit at the VP-pro/I2S-pro boundary. VP-P now has 3 canonical categories (value_distance_closure 33, drives_assembly_depth, admits_structurally_richer_corpus).

literal_family_split._doc: RQ3-driven split of the I2S fixed-offset-literal family by operand_kind: string/char vs numeric/tag/enum behave differently across engines.
